title: Lead Frontend Developer at Tech Mahindra Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Lead Frontend Developer at Tech Mahindra Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Tech Mahindra Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Frontend Developer at our Vadodara office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Tech Mahindra Holdings Services:
Tech Mahindra Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tech Mahindra Holdings Services!
